notes: Generated with built-in image generation as a neon-heavy redo of the Thermal Megalodon Subtank horror package.
The four forms keep a similar runtime footprint while increasing threat through extra armor, turrets, missile pods, reactor fins, cyan sensors, and orange thermal vents.
The accepted source sheet contains six pure robot subjects: four evolution stages, one static thermal-brine discharge munition, and one disabled mechanical wreck defeat still.
The source used a magenta chroma key. Background removal, grouped slicing, and a particle cleanup pass produced transparent runtime assets.
